summary: Set 103 Session 1 of 2: authored docs/tutorials/module-team-hello-world-copilot-ado.md — a standalone, linear, DRAFT-bannered re-cut of the flagship hello-world tutorial for a GitHub-Copilot-locked team on Azure DevOps (Copilot-seat Full tier as the spine with the auth-preflight/Set-086 safety rule and a Lightweight callout; an executable ADO bootstrap with branch policies, automatically-included reviewers, Build validation, and a complete two-layer azure-pipelines.yml; the git-workflow commands in ADO clothes). Authored the per-set UAT checklist (11 walks, 078 bar, Passes=null — Session 2 walks it live) whose Walks 5/8/9 discharge Set 102's armed ADO UAT and Walk 7 is the first live pipeline run. Added cross-links from the base tutorial, quick-start, and README (README line staged for the next publish), reciprocal every-echo maintenance notes, a sync-map appendix, and a review-prompt drift line item. Docs-only: no product code, no version bump. Routed documentation authoring (gemini-2.5-pro) + orchestrator fidelity pass; the suite caught one real drift-guard defect (fixed); cross-provider verification (gpt-5-6) ran the full phased loop — discovery(6)+supplementary(3) surfaced 7 distinct real defects (pipeline register-before-push, changes-job fetch-ref + persistCredentials, hosted-parallelism prerequisite, and three UAT-completeness gaps), all remediated, VERIFIED after two remediation-review cycles with 8/8 fixes accepted.

reason.specifics: Routed step-3.5 analysis recommends a top-tier model from a DIFFERENT provider than Session 1 for the operator-assisted live UAT walk — a cross-provider second opinion catches any Session-1 model-specific bias in the doc it just authored (raw verdict named a stale 'gpt-4o'; mapped to the registry that is gpt/openai/gpt-5-6). Runner-up: claude/anthropic/claude-opus-4-8 (keeps Session-1 context, forgoes the cross-provider benefit). Session 2 is HARD-BLOCKED on operator-supplied preconditions named in the spec — an Azure DevOps org + scratch project, a Copilot seat, a hosted parallel-jobs grant (or self-hosted agent), and ~half a day — and must be initialized with this session's UAT checklist plus Set 102's armed-ADO-walk record; if any precondition is absent at start, reschedule rather than run degraded.
